title: Sales Interior Designer
description:
🎯 Now Hiring: Sales Interior Designers (No Experience Needed, High Commissions!)Ready to Turn Your Passion for Interior Design into a Six-Figure Career?
Join Space Atelier, one of Singapore’s leading interior design firms, where your creativity meets unlimited income potential.We don’t just design spaces — we transform lives. Now, we’re looking for ambitious, passionate, and self-driven individuals to join our growing team of design professionals. Whether you're just starting out or making a career switch, we’ll equip you with the skills, leads, and mentorship to thrive.

🌟 Why Join Space Atelier?
💰 Earn What You’re Worth
Commission-based income with up to $5,000 per project — no cap on your earnings!
Our top performers earn 5-figure monthly incomes consistently.

🎯 100% Pre-Qualified Leads Provided
Forget cold calls. We supply high-quality, ready-to-buy leads, so you focus on doing what you do best — closing deals and designing spaces.🚀 Real Career Growth
Fast-track promotions into leadership and management roles.
Build and lead your own sales design team. Your career, your pace.

📚 Zero Experience? No Problem!
Comprehensive in-house training & 1-to-1 mentorship provided.
We invest in your growth — from design knowledge to closing high-ticket sales.

🎨 Creative Freedom on Prestigious Projects
Work on luxury condos, HDBs, landed homes, commercial showrooms, and retail spaces.
Express your creativity with full design autonomy and support.

🏆 Be Recognized & Rewarded
Regular performance bonuses, sales incentives, and company awards.
Recognition that fuels your ambition.

🕒 Flexible Work-Life Balance
Set your own schedule. Choose to work from our designer showroom or remotely.
Focus on results, not clocking hours.

📍 Prime Central Location
Based at 6 Harper Road, Leong Huat Building #05-07, Singapore 369674
5-min walk from Tai Seng MRT — convenient and accessible.


💼 Your Role
Consult & Inspire: Understand clients’ needs and present stunning design solutions that impress.
Pitch & Close: Deliver compelling presentations with mood boards, 3D renders, and materials that seal the deal.
Lead Projects: Be the client’s main point of contact from start to finish — own the full sales & design cycle.
Supervise On-Site: Conduct site visits and coordinate with contractors to ensure project quality and timelines.
Build Relationships: Deliver excellent customer service and cultivate repeat clients and referrals.


✅ Who We Want
Passionate individuals who love design and people.
Persuasive communicators with confidence and drive.
Motivated go-getters who want high income and are hungry to succeed.
Fresh grads and career switchers welcome — attitude matters more than experience.
Bonus: 💼 Your Next Step
Whether you're dreaming of becoming a top interior designer or aiming to hit a 6-figure income within a year — this is your launchpad.👉 Apply Now & Let’s Build Stunning Spaces Together
At Space Atelier, you don’t just join a company — you join a winning team that celebrates ambition, rewards effort, and empowers creativity.


📩 Submit your resume now. Interviews starting soon!

postedCompany.description:
Established in 2014, SPACE ATELIER PTE LTD, is a creative practice that operates within the field of interior design. We approach design through rigorous inquiry into the needs & challenges unique to each project, delivering tailored-made solutions & crafting spaces to reflect the unique quality of our client’s individuality, tastes, lifestyle and/or company image.

Our work experience covers a wide spectrum of interior design projects of varying profile & scale, including residential HDBs, prestigious condominiums, landed houses, commercial retail and office space
postedCompany.name: SPACE ATELIER PTE. LTD.
